🚨 MASSIVE STATEMENT BY RAVI SHASTRI ON AXAR PATEL 🚨

Ravi shastri said 🗣️ 

"I think they've got to bring him back. You need that experience. I'd say play both if you can, give yourself that extra option, because on any given day one bowler is bound to have an off day. For example, Varun Chakravarthy wasn't at his best yesterday and paid the pricefor it. So you need to the backup."
